top_signals.title: Fifa’s 64-team World Cup plan facing opposition from Uefa, Concacaf and Asia
top_signals.summary: Fifa’s plan to consider expanding the men’s World Cup to 64 teams is facing major pushback, with Uefa and other confederations believed to be firmly opposed to the proposal. The first edition of the tournament to feature 48 nations is yet to finish but Fifa president Gianni Infantino has revived the prospect of further expansion [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nature Integrated Routing for Whales & the Environment
top_signals.summary: In maritime circles we talk relentlessly about routing software in the name of safety, efficiency and reduced fuel burn. But what about “Nature Integrated Routing” which helps ships at sea avoid whale strikes and near misses? On this edition of Maritime Matters: The MarineLink Podcast…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Strategy sells $467M in MSTR shares, leaves 843,775 BTC stack untouched
top_signals.summary: Strategy boosted its US dollar reserve to $3 billion after selling $466.7 million in MSTR shares, while keeping its 843,775 Bitcoin holdings unchanged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Graduate start-ups require a new kind of office
top_signals.summary: The City’s future as an economic powerhouse is being driven by a new kind of graduate.  In years gone by, the Square Mile’s leading financial services, tech and consulting firms have hoovered up university leavers from the moment they don their graduation gowns, funnelling them from campus to office.  The next chapter in the City [...]

top_signals.title: Voyage Optimization Pilot Cuts Sleipnir Vessel’s Atlantic Transit by 2.5 Days
top_signals.summary: Heerema Marine Contractors has reduced the North Atlantic transit time of its semi-submersible crane vessel (SSCV) Sleipnir by 2.5 days following a voyage optimization pilot with French ocean intelligence company Amphitrite.The data-driven pilot…
